title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 386.400 - Utilities, corporations and persons may file complaint
text:
386.400.  Utilities, corporations and persons may file complaint. — Any corporation, person or public utility shall have the right to complain on any of the grounds upon which complaints are allowed to be filed by other parties, and the same procedure shall be adopted and followed as in other cases, except that the complaint may be served upon any parties designated by the commission.
(RSMo 1939 § 5687, A.L. 1977 H.B. 42 & 157) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5231; 1919 § 10519
